headline: These S&P500 stocks are gapping in today's session
summary: Stay tuned for the market movements in the S&P500 index on Thursday. Check out the gap up and gap down stocks in the S&P500 index during today's session.

headline: Indian Antitrust Probe Puts Spotlight On International Flavors Valuation Gap
summary: The Competition Commission of India has opened an investigation into alleged anti poaching agreements among major fragrance makers, including International Flavors & Fragrances. The case centers on whether these companies coordinated to restrict hiring from one another, which could affect labor mobility and competition in India. The inquiry introduces potential legal and reputational risks for NYSE:IFF in an important market for the global fragrance industry. For investors watching...
